root_text.an4.128:1.1: “Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvā cattāro acchariyā abbhutā dhammā pātubhavanti.
root_text.an4.128:1.4: sā tathāgatena anālaye dhamme desiyamāne sussūsati sotaṁ odahati aññā cittaṁ upaṭṭhapeti.
root_text.an4.128:1.5: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvā ayaṁ paṭhamo acchariyo abbhuto dhammo pātubhavati.
root_text.an4.128:2.2: Sā tathāgatena mānavinaye dhamme desiyamāne sussūsati sotaṁ odahati aññā cittaṁ upaṭṭhapeti.
root_text.an4.128:2.3: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvā ayaṁ dutiyo acchariyo abbhuto dhammo pātubhavati.
root_text.an4.128:3.2: Sā tathāgatena opasamike dhamme desiyamāne sussūsati sotaṁ odahati aññā cittaṁ upaṭṭhapeti.
root_text.an4.128:3.3: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvā ayaṁ tatiyo acchariyo abbhuto dhammo pātubhavati.
root_text.an4.128:4.2: Sā tathāgatena avijjāvinaye dhamme desiyamāne sussūsati sotaṁ odahati aññā cittaṁ upaṭṭhapeti.
root_text.an4.128:4.3: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvā ayaṁ catuttho acchariyo abbhuto dhammo pātubhavati.
root_text.an4.128:4.4: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvā ime cattāro acchariyā abbhutā dhammā pātubhavantī”ti.

translation_text.an4.128:0.3: Incredible Things About the Realized One (2nd)
translation_text.an4.128:1.1: “Mendicants, with the appearance of a Realized One, the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha, four incredible and amazing things appear.
translation_text.an4.128:1.3: People like clinging, they love it and enjoy it.
translation_text.an4.128:1.4: Yet when a Realized One is teaching the Dhamma of non-clinging, they want to listen, they actively listen, and they try to understand.
translation_text.an4.128:1.5: This is the first incredible and amazing thing that appears with the appearance of a Realized One.
translation_text.an4.128:2.1: People like conceit, they love it and enjoy it.
translation_text.an4.128:2.2: Yet when a Realized One is teaching the Dhamma of removing conceit, they want to listen, they actively listen, and they try to understand.
translation_text.an4.128:2.3: This is the second incredible and amazing thing that appears with the appearance of a Realized One.
translation_text.an4.128:3.1: People like excitement, they love it and enjoy it.
translation_text.an4.128:3.2: Yet when a Realized One is teaching the Dhamma of peace, they want to listen, they actively listen, and they try to understand.
translation_text.an4.128:3.3: This is the third incredible and amazing thing that appears with the appearance of a Realized One.
translation_text.an4.128:4.1: This population is lost in ignorance, swaddled in their shells.
translation_text.an4.128:4.2: Yet when a Realized One is teaching the Dhamma of removing ignorance, they want to listen, they actively listen, and they try to understand.
translation_text.an4.128:4.3: This is the fourth incredible and amazing thing that appears with the appearance of a Realized One.
translation_text.an4.128:4.4: With the appearance of a Realized One, the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha, four incredible and amazing things appear.”
